This surge was fueled by new model introductions, increased consumer interest, and worries about fuel prices. While sales dipped from March's peak

india_trends.title: Govt awarded 172 oil & gas blocks in 10 years, but negligible output brings policy and execution into focus
india_trends.summary: India's ambitious oil and gas policy has failed to boost domestic production. Despite billions invested and extensive exploration, only one marginal field is producing. india_trends.title: US Sanctions Iranian Exchanges, China Terminal on Oil Purchases
india_trends.summary: The Trump administration sanctioned three Iranian currency exchanges and a Chinese oil terminal on Friday, as the US adds to pressure on Tehran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

india_trends.title: Indian car companies begin FY27 on a strong note despite geopolitical uncertainties
india_trends.summary: Indian car sales surged 25% in April, reaching 445,417 units, driven by sustained demand post GST cuts and government incentives. Market leader Maruti Suzuki reported its best-ever monthly sales, with other major automakers like Tata Motors and Hyundai also witnessing significant year-on-year growth

india_trends.title: Zen Technologies Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 69% YoY to Rs 32 crore; revenue down 45%
india_trends.summary: Zen Technologies saw a significant drop in its March quarter performance. Net profit declined by 69% year-on-year, while revenue from operations fell by 45%. The company's profit after tax is attributable to its shareholders. Zen Technologies has declared a final dividend of Re 1 per share for FY26.

india_trends.title: Musk’s $158 billion payday is a lot like Tesla stock: full of hot air
india_trends.summary: Elon Musk's massive $158 billion compensation package from Tesla highlights stark economic disparities. While workers face stagnant wages and job insecurity due to AI, Musk's pay, tied to future performance targets, dwarfs company earnings and reflects an unsustainable economic trend.

india_trends.title: Missing Link to reshape Mumbai-Pune corridor, boost prospects of Mumbai 3.0
india_trends.summary: A major infrastructure project, the Missing Link on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway, is set to transform real estate. india_trends.title: Exxon Mobil shares fall despite first quarter earnings beat expectations, CEO warns oil prices may continue to rise
india_trends.summary: Exxon Mobil’s adjusted earnings for the first quarter reached $1.16 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.00

india_trends.title: Intel shares gain over 5%, extend record April rally as AI-driven demand fuels momentum
india_trends.summary: Intel shares soared 5.45% to $100.45, marking a 114% surge in April, fuelled by strong earnings and positive guidance. The rally reflects a resurgence in AI demand, pushing Intel's market value above $490 billion and indicating a promising turnaround strategy for the company.

india_trends.title: Russian government approves digital currency tax amendments
Jindal Steel FY26 profit up 20%, but costs weigh on margins
india_trends.summary: Jindal Steel reported record production in FY26, with net profit rising 20% and revenue up 8% on higher volumes and firm steel prices.

india_trends.title: US stock today | Spirit Airlines prepares to cease operations after bailout plan falls apart: Report
india_trends.summary: Spirit Airlines is reportedly nearing operational shutdown after failing to secure a bailout plan involving bondholders and the U.S. government. Disagreements over financing terms and a sharp increase in jet fuel prices due to the war in Iran have derailed the discount carrier's recovery efforts.
